title: Norwegian Salmon Skewers
description: Delicate salmon skewers with a flavorful and refreshing twist, inspired by the cuisine of Norway.

ingredients.name: Salmon fillets (6 oz)
ingredients.notes: Norwegian salmon is ideal for this dish.

ingredients.name: Delicate skewers
ingredients.notes: Wooden skewers work best for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Lemon wedges
ingredients.notes: Fresh lemons add a burst of citrus flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh dill
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh dill adds a bright and refreshing flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced garlic adds a savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality olive oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground black pepper adds a nice depth of flavor.

instructions: Cut the salmon into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, minced garlic, and chopped fresh dill.
Brush the mixture onto the salmon skewers.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side.
Garnish with fresh dill and serve hot.
